mapper.insert: INSERT INTO behavior_event ( event_id, user_id, event_type, source, spu_id, sku_id, thread_id, request_id, order_no, quantity, event_time, metadata_json ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{userId}, #{eventType}, #{source}, #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{threadId}, #{requestId}, #{orderNo}, #{quantity}, #{eventTime}, #{metadataJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
mapper.select: SELECT be.event_type, be.spu_id, be.sku_id, c.name AS category_name, GROUP_CONCAT(st.code ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR ',') AS style_tags, be.event_time FROM behavior_event be JOIN product_spu p ON p.id = be.spu_id JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN product_style_tag pst ON pst.spu_id = p.id LEFT JOIN style_tag st ON st.id = pst.style_tag_id WHERE be.user_id = #{userId} AND be.event_time >= #{since} AND be.spu_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY be.id, be.event_type, be.spu_id, be.sku_id, c.name, be.event_time ORDER BY be.event_time DESC, be.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
